content.scenarioHint: 你在学术汇报中提到使用了焦点小组访谈收集数据，教授对此感兴趣并想了解你如何确保访谈问题的客观性和有效性。
content.speakerText: How did you design your interview questions to avoid leading participants toward certain answers?
content.speakerTextCn: 你是如何设计访谈问题，以避免引导参与者得出特定答案的？
expectedAnswers: We used open-ended questions based on a pilot test and avoided loaded terms like 'should' or 'best'.
We reviewed questions with two independent researchers and revised any that could imply a preferred response.
We randomized the order of questions and included neutral follow-ups to reduce bias.
We kept questions simple and factual, like 'What was your experience?' instead of 'Don't you think it was unfair?'
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确说明了如何避免引导性问题
语言准确性：语法正确，用词专业，无中式英语
表达自然度：符合学术对话的口语习惯，不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了 'leading questions', 'bias', 'pilot test', 'neutral' 等关键词

content.speakerText: Why did you choose case study methodology over experimental design?
content.speakerTextCn: 你为什么选择案例研究方法而不是实验设计？
expectedAnswers: Case studies were more suitable because we wanted to understand complex real-world phenomena in their natural context.
Our research aimed to explore 'how' and 'why' questions, which case studies are designed to address, unlike experiments that test causal relationships.
Experimental control would have distorted the authentic behaviors we were trying to observe.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确说明方法与研究问题的匹配性
语言准确性：是否正确区分 case study 和 experimental design 的功能
表达自然度：是否避免绝对化表达（如 'experiments are bad'）并使用学术措辞
关键词覆盖：是否包含 case study, real-world context, exploratory questions, causal relationships 等核心概念
